findings.issue: isSafeReturnTo returns true for empty string, causing OAuthCallbackPage to call window.location.assign('') which reloads the page instead of redirecting to a safe destination
findings.remediation: Add an empty-string guard in isSafeReturnTo: if (!url || url === '') return false

findings.issue: LoginPage handleOAuthLogin error handler calls clearInvitationToken() but the login page never stores an invitation token; this is dead/confusing code that suggests the login flow has invitation-related state, which it does not
